announcements.title: OUM Memberships Now Open
announcements.description: Become an Official United Member today. Join MUSCB and be part of the official supporter community in Bengaluru. Registration is open now.

announcements.title: Next Match Screening
announcements.description: Details for the next United screening will be announced on our Instagram and WhatsApp community. Stay connected for venue and timing updates.

announcements.title: Upcoming Fan Meetup
announcements.description: United Fans Assemble is coming. RSVP through our link or WhatsApp. All MUSCB members and Manchester United fans in Bengaluru are welcome.

announcements.title: Football Matchday Registration
announcements.description: Sign up for the next MUSCB football matchday. Open to all members. Intra-club matches with players of all skill levels. Let's play.

announcements.title: MUSCB Giveaways & Drops
announcements.description: Watch our Instagram for exclusive MUSCB giveaways, signed memorabilia, merchandise drops, and member-only special offers.

announcements.title: Join Our WhatsApp Community
announcements.description: Get real-time updates, match alerts, screening notifications, and connect with all MUSCB members on our WhatsApp community channel.
